// Small formatting helpers used across Hades Agent.
export function relativeTime(iso){if(!iso)return"—";const then=new Date(iso).getTime();const now=Date.now();const diff=Math.round((now-then)/1000);const abs=Math.abs(diff);const sign=diff>=0?"ago":"from now";const units=[[60,"s"],[3600,"m"],[86400,"h"],[604800,"d"],[2592000,"w"]];if(abs<60)return"".concat(abs,"s ").concat(sign);if(abs<3600)return"".concat(Math.round(abs/60),"m ").concat(sign);if(abs<86400)return"".concat(Math.round(abs/3600),"h ").concat(sign);if(abs<604800)return"".concat(Math.round(abs/86400),"d ").concat(sign);return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(undefined,{month:"short",day:"numeric"});}export function formatDateTime(iso){if(!iso)return"—";return new Date(iso).toLocaleString(undefined,{year:"numeric",month:"short",day:"2-digit",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});}export function formatBytes(bytes){if(!bytes)return"0 B";const units=["B","KB","MB","GB","TB"];const i=Math.floor(Math.log(bytes)/Math.log(1024));return"".concat((bytes/Math.pow(1024,i)).toFixed(i===0?0:1)," ").concat(units[i]);}export function formatDuration(ms){if(ms==null)return"—";if(ms<1000)return"".concat(ms,"ms");const s=ms/1000;if(s<60)return"".concat(s.toFixed(1),"s");const m=Math.floor(s/60);const rem=Math.round(s%60);return"".concat(m,"m ").concat(rem,"s");}export function titleCase(s){return s.replace(/_/g," ").replace(/\b\w/g,c=>c.toUpperCase());}
